title: Packaging machine
abstract: Machine for packaging paper rolls (R) comprising adhesivation means (EG) adapted for applying an adhesive substance (GG) on an internal side of a side flap of a packaging sheet, which adhesivation means act while the rolls (R) pass through an entry station (E) of the machine.
claims: 1. Packaging machine comprising: a packaging unit with an entry station having an elevator for arranging one or more paper rolls in a configuration suitable for their packaging with a packaging sheet of paper material so as to realize packages comprising an upper side, a lower side formed by the junction of two side flaps of the packaging sheet folded under the rolls, side folds, a first head flap and a head closure flap on each head, the latter being formed by a flap overlapping and joined to the other flaps; packaging sheet feeding means for feeding a packaging sheet of paper material to said entry station, the packaging sheet feeding means comprising an unwinder for supporting a packaging sheet reel; folding means comprising mobile horizontal surfaces apt to fold two side flaps of the packaging sheet under the rolls; joining means comprising a presser for joining said side flaps to one another under the rolls; conveyor means for moving the packages being formed along a predefined direction inside the machine; a folding unit comprising movable side folders and a fixed lateral counter-folder configured for forming two side folds on each of the two heads of each package while the packages advance along said direction; head closure means comprising helically shaped surfaces configured for forming a head closure flap on each head of the package;
